title: Citrusy Portuguese Cream Puffs
description: A twist on the classic cream puff, infused with the brightness of citrus and the warmth of portuguese spices.

ingredients.name: Citrusy cream
ingredients.notes: see below for citrusy cream recipe

instructions: Roll out dumplings into thin circles.
Brush with melted butter, then sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.
Dust with lemon zest and cinnamon.
Place on a baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, whip citrusy cream until stiff peaks form.
Fold in beaten egg until well combined.
Assemble cream puffs by spooning citrusy cream into dumpling centers.
Return to oven for an additional 5 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve warm, dust with confectioners' sugar.
